checks.observed: Fresh visit redirected to /he/auth/login; email field and submit button visible.
Minted session landed on /he without login loop.
Streak 2, points 410, four topics with numeric progress rendered.
Hebrew copy with lang=he and dir=rtl; no raw translation keys.
#quiz-container present with question, four options, and question image.
Correct feedback showed textual confirmation; wrong answer showed textual feedback and advanced progress.
501 quiz submissions returned 200 but 364 returned 429 while the UI continued.
Final screen showed 122/501 correct; POST /api/progress returned 200.
Dashboard changed from 23/501 to 501/501 on traffic-laws and points from 410 to 1540.
Console contained 364 error-level failed-resource entries for 429 quiz submissions.
Headings, button names, lang/dir correct; question image had alt text; feedback conveyed in text not color alone.
Visible Home, Quiz, and TabBar strings matched Hebrew messages without direction breakage.

findings.title: Stop quiz completion when answer submissions are rejected
repro_steps: Open an authenticated topic quiz with many questions.
Confirm answers at a steady pace (~1 per second).
Observe 429 responses on POST /api/quiz while the UI continues.
Finish the quiz and return to the dashboard.
findings.expected: A rejected answer produces a visible retry/error state, and completion is not saved until required answer records are accepted.
findings.actual: 364 answer submissions returned 429, but the UI displayed 122/501 on the final screen, POST /api/progress returned 200, and the dashboard showed 501/501 questions answered.

not_tested: Email OTP send path (auth is minted)
Flashcards, schedule, videos, resources, credits, more pages
Exploration budget probes (double-click, browser back mid-quiz, reload mid-quiz)
limitations: Quiz auto-answered with 900ms pacing; 364 submissions still hit rate limits.
Exploration budget not executed due to timebox on the long quiz.
